procurement_guidelines: Match product label to crop type and growth stage before purchase.
Confirm active ingredient and registration status in your jurisdiction.
Buy only quantities that can be applied within recommended windows.

issue_to_product_type.why: Manage active disease pressure and improve canopy-zone resilience over time.
Use threshold-based targeted control rather than broad calendar spraying.
Supports pH correction and nutrient availability when soil tests confirm need.
Improves soil structure and long-term nutrient cycling.

recommendation_examples.user_question: Leaves have spots after humid weather. What should I get?
recommended_flow: Confirm symptom pattern and disease risk conditions first.
Recommend targeted fungicide options available in nearby stores.
Add one preventive cultural step: airflow, sanitation, irrigation timing.

recommendation_examples.user_question: Field is weak and yellow. Which product helps?
recommended_flow: Check likely nutrient stress and soil moisture context.
Suggest staged nutrient correction product class, not single guaranteed cure.
Advise follow-up observation window and local agronomist verification.
